author: funnygiulio
content: Hey <@&688090867927482525> <@&652918665943056397> <@&836981603216654336> <@&1070471163219824730> . <@703742742135570499> showed in https://ethresear.ch/t/data-driven-analysis-on-eip-7907/23850 that 64KB max contract size is safe without a gas model (7907 or 2926). I was thinking of proposing a 64KB bump for Hegota, but actually I think it is more pragmatic to just update 7954 to 64KB and call it a day and then maybe in Hegotà, I can see If I can figure out a decent gas model for 256KB (seems 7907 is in conflict with other stuff). I think it is better also from a protocol perspective as you have less complexity around max code size long term
